result.reasoning: Series uses 10x Chromium 5' CITE-seq with paired GEX, ADT/HTO, and TCR libraries from peripheral blood CD4+ T cells, with disease status determined by ARC/dARC (HIV infection) versus uninfected (healthy) conditions in sample titles.
